vague_text: There's a cluster of polling places packed too tightly somewhere in the county. Multiple sites within a small radius is redundant when one or two would suffice. Spread them out by closing some, freeing budget for sparser areas.
precise_text: There's an over-concentration of polling places: sites 0, 5, 6, 32 are within walking distance of each other. Close some so we free budget for sparser areas.
